title: CoordDisplay
description: Displays coordinates, time, and day above the hotbar. Clean, simple, and client-side only.
body:
# Coord Display

A simple Fabric mod that displays your current XYZ coordinates and the in-game day/time **above the hotbar**.

## Features

- Shows your current XYZ position in yellow and white.
- Displays the current Minecraft day and time.
- HUD is centered and appears just above the hotbar.
- Works on both desktop and mobile (PojavLauncher) with Fabric.



## Installation

1. Download the latest `.jar` from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/coorddisplay) or the releases page.
2. Place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch Minecraft with Fabric Loader.

## No Config

This mod does not generate a config file. The HUD position and colors are fixed.

---

Enjoy!
